title: Kalshi Market Series
description: Series metadata for a class of Kalshi markets (e.g., all JFK high temperature markets).

ticker.description: Series ticker (e.g., KXHIGHJFK = JFK high temp).

measure_type.description: Type of weather measurement this series tracks. Kalshi API uses 'high'/'low'. Legacy format uses 'HIGH_TEMP'/'LOW_TEMP'.

tags.description: Classification tags. Can be empty array.

active.description: Whether series is currently active on Kalshi.

last_seen_at.description: Last time this series was observed in Kalshi market data.
